title: Shipping Policy
content: All orders are processed within 2–4 business days after order confirmation.
Standard delivery across India typically takes 5–8 business days depending on location.
Express delivery (2–3 business days) is available for select pin codes at an additional charge.
Shipping charges are calculated at checkout based on the delivery location and order weight.
Once dispatched, you will receive a tracking link via Instagram.
For orders within Mumbai, same-day or next-day delivery may be available on request.
ELAROSE is not responsible for delays caused by courier partners, natural events, or incorrect address details provided by the customer.
All products are carefully packaged to ensure they arrive in perfect condition.

title: Refund Policy
content: As every piece is handcrafted to order, we are unable to offer refunds on customised items.
In the rare event your order arrives damaged, please share unboxing photos within 24 hours of delivery.
We will gladly remake or replace the affected item at no extra cost — our promise to you.
If an incorrect item is delivered, please notify us within 24 hours and we will resolve it promptly.
Refunds for non-customised standard items may be considered on a case-by-case basis.
Refund requests must be raised via Instagram or email within 48 hours of delivery.

title: Cancellation Policy
content: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement at no charge.
After 2 hours, cancellation is not possible as crafting begins immediately.
For bulk or custom orders with advance payment, cancellation is not possible after order confirmation.
In case of cancellation within the window, full payment will be refunded within 5–7 business days.
To cancel, please message us immediately on Instagram with your order details.

title: Privacy Policy
content: We collect your name, phone number, address, and order details solely to process and deliver your orders.
Your personal information is never sold, shared, or disclosed to third parties.
We may use your contact details to send order updates and occasional gift inspiration — you can opt out anytime.
Our website does not store payment information; all transactions are handled securely via Instagram.
By placing an order, you consent to the collection and use of information as described.
We take all reasonable measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access.

title: Terms & Conditions
content: All products are handmade and may have slight variations in color and texture — this is the beauty of handcraft.
Product images are representative; actual items may vary slightly due to the handmade nature.
Prices are subject to change without prior notice. Orders are billed at the price confirmed at time of order.
ELAROSE reserves the right to refuse orders that violate our policies.
Bulk orders (5+ pieces) require a minimum lead time of 7 business days.
All designs, content, and branding on this website are the intellectual property of ELAROSE.
By placing an order, you agree to all terms and policies listed on this page.
